caption: A man wearing a dark sleeveless vest over a light-colored long-sleeved shirt speaks into a microphone bearing the "ANI" logo. He is positioned outdoors in a park-like setting with green trees and a white fence in the background. The video is framed by a news broadcast overlay. On the left side of the screen, headshots of men are accompanied by text such as "डिप्टी CM", "सप्रत चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", and "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार". On the right side, headshots are labeled "मंत्री", "संतोष सुमन", and "सुमित कुमार". A large yellow and red "BREAKING NEWS" banner spans the bottom, with a timestamp showing "10:02 PM". The top headline changes across the sequence; it begins as "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" and then switches to "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है". The speaker's facial expressions and mouth movements shift as he talks throughout the clip.
